reasons: Tigreal can group or displace enemies, giving Moskov better angles for piercing basic attacks and Spear of Misery follow-up.
Moskov can stay behind the engage and convert Tigreal's crowd-control window into repeated basic-attack pressure.

proof.summary: Tigreal creates the crowd-control opening, while Moskov converts the setup into repeated basic attacks and possible wall-stun pressure.
worksBestWhen: Tigreal engages near walls or narrow jungle paths.
Moskov is already close enough to follow safely.
failureCases: Tigreal engages too far from Moskov.
Moskov dashes forward before the enemy is controlled.
The enemy spreads out and denies Moskov's piercing attack value.

reasons: Atlas can pull enemies into a compact area, giving Moskov a clearer front-to-back attack line.
Moskov can punish the grouped formation with sustained basic attacks after Atlas starts the teamfight.

proof.summary: Atlas creates a grouped target area, while Moskov punishes the formation with sustained marksman damage.
worksBestWhen: Moskov attacks from behind the frontline.
failureCases: Moskov is zoned before he can hit.
Enemies dash or cleanse after the pull.

reasons: Lolita protects Moskov from ranged pressure, helping him keep basic-attack uptime in front-to-back fights.
Moskov can use Lolita's frontline spacing to attack safely while preserving his dash for repositioning.

proof.summary: Moskov needs time to attack repeatedly, while Lolita creates a safer damage pocket against ranged poke and projectile pressure.
worksBestWhen: Lolita positions between Moskov and enemy poke.
failureCases: Lolita's shield is baited before the real fight.
Moskov separates from Lolita's protection range.

reasons: Angela can protect Moskov when he commits with dash timing or gets targeted by dive pressure.
Moskov can keep attacking longer when Angela adds shielding and healing during his danger window.

proof.summary: Angela extends Moskov's survival window during risky repositioning, helping him keep attacking after committing.
worksBestWhen: Angela saves Heartguard for Moskov's real danger window.
Moskov already has enough damage to convert the protection.
failureCases: Moskov is burst before Angela can attach.
Moskov dashes into layered hard crowd control.
Angela attaches after Moskov has already lost position.

reasons: Estes keeps Moskov healthy during extended grouped fights, giving Moskov more time to maintain basic-attack pressure.
Moskov benefits from nearby healing and frontline cover because his damage pattern depends on staying alive long enough to keep attacking.

proof.summary: Estes sustains Moskov during grouped fights, giving Moskov more time to build pressure through repeated attacks.
worksBestWhen: Moskov stays within Estes' healing range.
The team plays around a grouped frontline.
failureCases: Enemy burst kills Moskov before healing matters.
